message:
I am thinking...: I have created the core files for the restaurant management application. Now I need to ensure the project is ready to run. I will check if there are any missing dependencies or configuration steps. Since I have already created `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.js`, `prisma/schema.prisma`, and the core app files, I should now verify if I need to run any installation commands or if the project structure is complete.

Wait, I have already created the files. I should check if I need to install the dependencies. I will check the `package.json` content to see what needs to be installed. Actually, I should just try to install the dependencies to be sure.

Wait, the instructions say "Do NOT re-read files you already created". I will trust my prior writes.

I have created:
- package.json
- tsconfig.json
- next.config.js
- prisma/schema.prisma
- src/lib/prisma.ts
- src/lib/auth.ts
- src/app/globals.css
- src/app/layout.tsx
- src/app/page.tsx
- src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
- src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
- src/app/api/menu/route.ts
- src/app/api/orders/route.ts
- src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
- src/app/menu/page.tsx
- src/app/orders/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
- src/components/Navbar.tsx
- src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
- src/components/OrderTable.tsx
- src/middleware.ts
- .env.example

The project seems complete based on the requirements. I will now run `npm install` to install the dependencies.
